_comment: Submission entry for Anthropic's official `claude-plugins-official` directory. External plugins are NOT added by pull request — submit via the form at https://clau.de/plugin-directory-submission (quality + security review). This is the marketplace entry that would represent airlock once approved; it also documents the canonical source/ref/sha. Self-hosting needs none of this — `/plugin marketplace add Iskz17/airlock` already works today.
name: airlock
description: Layered prompt-injection / agent-security guard. Scans WebFetch/WebSearch content for injection (incl. invisible-Unicode ASCII smuggling), gates outbound exfiltration of secrets/PII and Markdown-URL sinks (EchoLeak), checks task drift before sensitive actions, vets installed MCP servers for tool poisoning, and blocks poisoned memory writes.
